who: HR administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For HR administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual filing causes compliance risks and potential penalties. We automate payroll tax filings instead of manual filing through spreadsheets and paper forms.
problem: Manual payroll tax filing processes lead to compliance risks and potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR administrators
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll solutions
DM outreach to HR admins with demo video
Engage in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for data entry and basic reporting for tax obligations on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
